tasks.prompt:
OAuth health check (read-only). The host process owns token refresh — do not edit files under /workspace/extra/credentials/.

1. Run `ncl oauth-health` and review all tokens.
2. If scriptOutput shows expired/errors, or any token has status expired/expiring/error, or expiresInMin <= 10:
   - Post a concise summary to #sysops (slack:C07F195GB96).
   - Run `ncl oauth-refresh-now` and include results in your sysops message.
   - If refresh still fails, tell Cian which token needs manual re-auth and the token_file from the registry.
3. If all tokens are healthy, exit silently — do not post to #sysops.

Deliver Christina's daily cycle briefing. The pre-task script attached today's briefing in scriptOutput. Send it in this DM — keep the structure and tone warm and supportive. Do not re-run cycle_briefing.mjs unless scriptOutput is missing.

pendingCleo.note: Cleo production v2 DB only wires dm-with-cian. slack_scheduled tasks (im-sync, im-digest, im-audit, ganttsy-resume-daily, shadow-transcript-sync) are documented in agents/cleo/groups/slack_scheduled/CLAUDE.md but need a v2 agent group + messaging wiring before seeding. Use /manage-channels or ncl after Slack channel is registered.
